title: Vanilla Freecam
description: A vanilla datapack to enable freecam on a server for all players
body:
# Vanilla freecam
A simple datapack that allows all players to use freecam.
> **This is _NOT_ Client-Side**

## Usage
Simply run the command `/trigger freecam` to toggle your freecam state.

## Important Notes
This will put the user into spectator mode, meaning they CANNOT be defeated. Not recommended for PvP scenarios.
